name: The Child Answers Unasked
summary: The child, who has been silent, answers a question the investigator was only thinking.
narrative_beats: The child has not lifted her head since you entered.
You are wondering, not aloud, whether anyone on this Train remembers boarding it.
'No,' she says. The word is small and clear.
Her mouth has not moved. The bear's button eyes are on you.
Her head goes back down. The carriage is as it was.
consequences_if_passed: Investigator registers the impossibility but holds steady.
Child remains approachable; her first fragment is now reachable via Psychology.
consequences_if_failed: Investigator's hand goes to the back of the nearest chair.
On a 5+ SAN loss, a temporary insanity check; the carriage may briefly seem unreal.
